title: A Meeting That Changes Shandora
description: Noland confronts the village’s disease and superstition, challenging the sacrifices that have shaped Shandora’s fear.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, this scene focuses on Calgara, Mont Blanc Noland, Musse, Shandia villagers, Nola. Noland confronts the village’s disease and superstition, challenging the sacrifices that have shaped Shandora’s fear.

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Noland
dialogue.text: The earthquake just now was proof.

dialogue.speaker: Calgara
dialogue.text: Lord Kashi....? Ohh... you mean that snake...

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Noland
dialogue.text: I don't want to see your face.

summary: Noland confronts the village’s disease and superstition, challenging the sacrifices that have shaped Shandora’s fear.
